description: Text card on a solid royal-blue background. A large red-and-white quotation mark sits at the upper left, followed by a bold white title 'Joint DHS/FBI Statement on Reports of Drones in New Jersey'. The body is several white paragraphs of text addressing the December 2024 New Jersey drone-sighting reports, stating there is no evidence the sightings pose a national security or public safety threat or have a foreign nexus, that many reported sightings appear to be lawfully operating manned aircraft, and that there are no confirmed drone sightings in restricted airspace. The DHS seal appears at the lower right with a thin red horizontal rule.
notable_text: Joint DHS/FBI Statement on Reports of Drones in New Jersey; 'We have no evidence at this time that the reported drone sightings pose a national security or public safety threat or have a foreign nexus.'
